description: The terminal scanner for AI-agent readiness: every check the web tool runs, plus copy-paste fixes, CI gating, scan history, and a local store the web UI has no answer for.

novel_features.name: CI readiness gate
novel_features.description: Fail a build when a site drops below a target readiness level or when a previously-passing check regresses.

novel_features.name: Cross-site open-advice backlog
novel_features.description: List every still-failing check across all your scanned sites with its fix prompt, so you see exactly what is left to do.

novel_features.name: Score-over-time history
novel_features.description: Show a site's readiness level across every past scan and flag which checks flipped pass/fail between scans.

novel_features.name: Two-scan regression diff
novel_features.description: Diff two scans of a site (default: the latest two) into a per-check regressed/fixed/unchanged table plus the level delta.

novel_features.name: Competitor standards matrix
novel_features.description: Scan several sites and print a check-by-check matrix of which agent standards each one implements, plus each site's level.

novel_features.name: Portfolio batch scan
novel_features.description: Scan a list of URLs from a file or stdin, persist each, and print a leaderboard ranked by level or failing-check count.
